title: SENIOR INFORMATION AND ASSISTANCE - 211info
text: URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND SENIOR INFORMATION AND ASSISTANCE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Connects older adults with services that allow them to remain safely in their homes and communities (elder law, home maintenance and minor repair services, housekeeping assistance, Medicare counseling, housing information and referral, advocacy, and senior ride program). Services include Oregon Project Independence Services (OPI) and community resources. Additionally offers short-term case management (Options Counseling) and chronic disease management. Confidential Address Eligibility: Age 60 and older with a focus on the African-American community Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (503) 280-2600 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 280-2600 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: North and Northeast Portland, zip codes 97203, 97211, 97212, 97213, 97217, 97218, 97220, 97230, and 97232 Services: Case/Care Management * African American Community Case/Care Management * Older Adults Chronic Disease Self Management Programs Elder Law Elder Law * African American Community Home Maintenance and Minor Repair Services * African American Community Home Maintenance and Minor Repair Services * Older Adults Housekeeping Assistance * African American Community Housekeeping Assistance * Older Adults Medicare Information/Counseling Medicare Information/Counseling * African American Community Senior Housing Information and Referral Senior Housing Information and Referral * African American Community Senior Ride Programs Senior Ride Programs * African American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - ADVOCACY AND CIVIC ENGAGEMENT EMPLOYMENT - WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - COMMUNITY HEALTH HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - OREGON HEALTH PLAN COMMUNITY PARTNER LEGAL SERVICES - FAIR HOUSING ENFORCEMENT COLLABORATIVE SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - YOUTH PROGRAMS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. URBAN LEAGUE OF PORTLAND
